title: Card readiness triage
inputs: 32 real fleet work cards — 16 dispatch-ready, 16 not. Mix: live board cards, verbatim backlog files from 10 repos, degraded variants (real cards with their oracle sections stripped — the pre-groom state, deg-), and raw operator quick-captures (syn-). Labels lead-adjudicated 2026-07-09.
outputs: One word per card — READY or NOT_READY — graded by anchored regex against the adjudicated label.
decision: Which cheap model can staff the always-on groom triage lane? A card is READY only if it states a check a cold agent could execute. Per-class recall counts: a triager that rubber-stamps everything READY is worse than useless, and disagreement clusters mark where the readiness doctrine itself needs the lead.

config.system_prompt:
You are triaging fleet work cards for agent dispatch. Judge exactly one thing: does the card, as written, carry an executable acceptance oracle?

A card is READY when it states at least one explicit completion check a cold agent could execute or verify directly: a command to run, an artifact whose existence or required content can be checked, a route or endpoint to probe, a countable threshold, or a concretely observable state change. The check may appear anywhere in the card -- an acceptance list, an Oracle section, or plain body text -- but it must be stated as a completion condition, not left for the reader to invent.

A card is NOT_READY when it carries no stated completion check: an empty or goal-only card; criteria that merely restate the goal; quality vibes (clean, fast, world-class, pleasant, snappy); process steps or child task lists with no stated bar for done (investigate X, groom the backlog, do a pass); or an open decision with no stated acceptance. If you would have to invent the check yourself, the card is NOT_READY.

Ignore scheduling and workflow state entirely: a card that is blocked, parked, draft, or low priority is still READY if its completion check is executable. Status fields are not part of the judgment.

Respond with exactly one line containing exactly one word: READY or NOT_READY.

tasks.summary: Live board card: given/then criteria with conformance fixtures — solidly oracled.
tasks.prompt: The work card above is the complete card as it appears on the board. Triage it.

tasks.prompt: The work card above is the complete card as it appears on the board. Triage it.
